title: Hydrate live OpenAI synthesis grounding input
problem: The live OpenAI synthesis canary reaches the API and writes candidate output, but deterministic grounding fails because OpenAISynthesisClient sends mostly IDs and refs while synthesis_grounding validates overlap against grounded claim_text and atom canonical_text. The model cannot reliably satisfy the existing evaluator without seeing the grounded text that the evaluator uses.
acceptance_criteria: OpenAISynthesisClient request body includes public-safe grounded claim_text, atom canonical_text, stance, scope, and source metadata from v0.2.0 synthesis packets.
OpenAI synthesis prompt requires each returned sentence to cite provided claim_ids, atom_ids, and source_refs and to reuse significant wording from cited claim and atom text.
Parsed OpenAI summary_sentences normalize source_refs to source_id strings when the provider returns source_ref objects, while rejecting unresolvable citations.
Injected-HTTP unit coverage proves the grounded fixture packet can produce candidate output with grounding_passed true, governor_verdict GO, and no_accepted_graph_writes true.
Default mock_cloud synthesis, pytest, golden tests, verify, and operator execute-safe remain mock-first and do not require OPENAI_API_KEY.
test_plan: Optional operator-only live canary after tests: python -m rge.cli synthesize --packet fixtures/synthesis/grounded_evidence_packet_dry_run.json --provider openai --confirm --load-operator-env --output-dir data/tmp/openai_synthesis_canary
non_goals: Do not loosen grounding min_overlap thresholds or bypass synthesis_grounding.
Do not make live OpenAI HTTP part of default pytest, golden tests, verify, fixture-mode runs, or execute-safe.
Do not write model output directly to accepted graph tables.
Do not publish public-site JSON or run export-public --publish.
Do not serialize API keys, raw prompts, local paths, private notes, or raw source text.
rollback_plan: Revert the OpenAI request hydration, citation normalization, and tests. Leave RGE_CLOUD_LLM_ENABLED=0 or remove openai from RGE_CLOUD_SYNTHESIS_PROVIDER_ALLOWLIST to disable live HTTP while retaining mock_cloud behavior.
